## ProductionTools.ItemPickerDialog() function

Generic item picker dialog with search functionality.

Displays a modal overlay with a searchable list of items. Used for selecting fillings, chocolates, procedures, etc.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function ItemPickerDialog<TId extends string = string>({ isOpen, title, items, onSelect, onClose, searchPlaceholder, excludeIds, emptyMessage }: IItemPickerDialogProps<TId>): React.ReactElement | null;
```

</td><td>

**Returns:**

React.ReactElement \| null

Item picker dialog element or null if closed

## Example


```tsx
<ItemPickerDialog
  isOpen={showPicker}
  title="Select Filling"
  items={availableFillings}
  onSelect={(item) => {
    actions.addFillingOption(slotId, { type: 'recipe', id: item.id });
    setShowPicker(false);
  }}
  onClose={() => setShowPicker(false)}
  excludeIds={existingFillingIds}
/>
```
